description: After the catalog refactor (see desktop-studio-plugin-catalog-json-loader bead), migrate the 5 existing plugin entries (edge-slot-runtime, environment-pulse, session-clock, companion-process-supervisor, and the 5th — confirm count) from their Swift-literal form in DesktopStudioPluginCatalog.swift to standalone JSON files conforming to DesktopStudioPluginDescriptor. Drop them at the well-known scan paths the new loader uses. Verify the prototype renders identically to its current state after the migration (snapshot test or visual diff).
title: Migrate desktop-studio prototype's 5 hardcoded plugins to *.studio-plugin.json files
